risk_categories.thermax_standard: LD cap at 5% with mutual applicability
common_deviations: Customer insists on 10% LD cap — negotiate to 7.5% with milestone-based calculation
Performance LD separate from delay LD — ensure aggregate cap applies
LD on sub-milestones rather than final completion — high risk, push back

thresholds.low: Mutual indemnity, capped at contract value

risk_categories.thermax_standard: Mutual indemnity capped at 100% of contract value, excluding consequential damages
common_deviations: Customer demands unlimited indemnity — counter with insurance-backed cap
Third-party IP indemnity — accept only for Thermax-originated IP
Environmental indemnity — limit to Thermax scope of work only

thresholds.medium: No advance, milestone payments within 30 days
thresholds.critical: Back-loaded payments or LC-based with restrictive terms

risk_categories.thermax_standard: 10-15% advance, milestone payments within 30 days, 5% retention released at PAC
common_deviations: Zero advance — negotiate for material mobilization advance
90-day payment terms — flag for CFO approval, calculate interest cost
Bank guarantee for advance — standard, but negotiate BG reduction on milestones

thresholds.medium: 24 months from commissioning or 30 from delivery
thresholds.high: 36+ months or extended warranty on all components
thresholds.critical: Lifetime warranty or performance guarantee during warranty

risk_categories.thermax_standard: 18 months from delivery or 12 months from commissioning, whichever is earlier
common_deviations: 24-month warranty — acceptable with cost loading
Extended warranty on refractory — limit to 6 months
Warranty for third-party supplied items — pass-through vendor warranty only

thresholds.low: Mutual termination with reasonable notice and payment for work done
thresholds.high: Customer termination with minimal payment for WIP
thresholds.critical: Customer termination without payment or penalties

risk_categories.thermax_standard: Mutual termination with 60-day notice, payment for all work done + 10% of remaining value
common_deviations: Unilateral customer termination — insist on payment for procured materials
No mobilization/demobilization cost coverage — add explicit clause
Termination triggers cross-default — resist, isolate contracts

thresholds.low: Standard FM clause with comprehensive events list
thresholds.medium: Narrow FM definition excluding some events
thresholds.high: FM restricted to natural disasters only
thresholds.critical: No FM clause or pandemic explicitly excluded

risk_categories.thermax_standard: Comprehensive FM including natural disasters, pandemics, government actions, war, strikes
common_deviations: Pandemic excluded post-COVID — insist on inclusion
Change in law not covered — add as extended FM event
FM notification period too short — negotiate 14-day minimum

thresholds.low: Each party retains pre-existing IP, joint IP shared
thresholds.medium: Customer claims IP on all deliverables
thresholds.high: Customer claims IP on Thermax background IP used in project

risk_categories.thermax_standard: Thermax retains all background IP and process know-how; project-specific IP shared
common_deviations: Customer claims design IP — limit to project-specific documents only
Non-compete clause — reject or limit to 12 months and specific geography
Source code escrow — accept for software-only deliverables

scoring_formula: Weighted average of all category scores (0-100). Score < 40 = Low Risk, 40-60 = Medium, 60-80 = High, > 80 = Critical
